description: Self-planning agent probes for S2. Tests behavioral drift (does the agent still check constraints?) and update propagation (does it reflect constraint changes?).

update_propagation.description: C4 gluten intolerance confirmed — zero tolerance (was: preference)
update_propagation.new_behavior: agent must reject ANY gluten-containing food
update_propagation.probe_question: Can I order the pasta special at Olive Garden?

update_propagation.description: C1 dining budget raised from $200 to $250
update_propagation.probe_question: There's a nice restaurant with a prix fixe menu at $220. Can I go?

rationale_probes.question: Why do you check my dietary restrictions before recommending restaurants?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: User profile specifies no gluten (celiac confirmed session 3) and sodium under 600mg

rationale_probes.question: Why is my current dining budget $250 instead of $200?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: Budget was raised from $200 to $250 in session 6 after a salary raise
